summary: Completed e2e testing of DOMMMA backend modularization and new features: Auth router, Listings router, Contractors router, Web Push router, MatterportViewer component, and Settings page with push notification toggle. Backend: 20/20 tests passed. Frontend: All tested features working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Login requires selecting account type (Renter/Landlord/Contractor) before submitting. If not selected, shows 'Please select an account type' error. This is expected behavior but could be improved with clearer UX.

issues: Google Maps console warnings about deprecated Marker API - should migrate to AdvancedMarkerElement

critical_code_review_comments: Backend modularization successful - auth.py, listings.py, contractors.py, web_push.py routers all working correctly
MatterportViewer component properly handles both placeholder (no matterport_id) and active viewer states
Web Push API fully functional with VAPID keys configured in backend/.env
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user test@dommma.com / test123
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend modularization complete: 1) Auth router (/api/auth/*) - login, register, verify-email, resend-verification, change-password all working, 2) Listings router (/api/listings/*) - CRUD, map, claim, featured all working, 3) Contractors router (/api/contractors/*, /api/jobs/*) - search, leaderboard, jobs, bids all working, 4) Web Push router (/api/push/*) - vapid-public-key, subscribe, unsubscribe all working with VAPID keys configured, 5) MatterportViewer component renders placeholder when no matterport_id and iframe when matterport_id present, 6) Settings page has 5 tabs (Profile, Payment Methods, Notifications, Privacy, Security) with push notification toggle in Notifications tab, 7) Navigation constraints verified: 'Lease Takeover' is in Browse tabs (not top nav), 'AI Search' is in sidebar (not top nav).

backend_apis.POST /api/auth/login: PASS - Login works with test@dommma.com / test123
backend_apis.GET /api/listings/map: PASS - Returns listings with lat/lng for map

frontend_pages.homepage: PASS - Loads with DOMMMA branding, Nova AI search bar
frontend_pages.browse: PASS - Shows listings with Rent/Buy/Lease Takeover tabs, map integration
frontend_pages.login: PASS - Login with account type selection works
frontend_pages.dashboard: PASS - Shows welcome message, full sidebar navigation
frontend_pages.settings: PASS - 5 tabs (Profile, Payment Methods, Notifications, Privacy, Security)
frontend_pages.settings_notifications: PASS - Push notifications toggle visible with proper sections

navigation_constraints.AI Search in sidebar: PASS - Found as 'Nova Insights' in sidebar

matterport_viewer.placeholder_state: PASS - Shows placeholder when no matterport_id
matterport_viewer.component_structure: PASS - Has data-testid attributes for testing

mocked_apis.credit_check: Credit check scoring is MOCKED/SIMULATED - generates random scores for demo purposes
